MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHANNON, RICHARD M. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JUL-10-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON JUL-17-1996 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ALL PARTIES AND COUNSEL PRE- SENT, EXCEPT RICHARD M. SHANNON WHO WAS REPRESENTED BY HIS ATTORNEY OF RECORD, ARNOLD EVJE II AND BY HIS SON, PATRICK SHANNON. MARTA BROADDUS, INTERPRETER TRANSLATED THE TERMS OF THE SETTLEMENT TO DEFENDANT MIRTHA GUITIERREZ. CASE SETTLED. TERMS RECORDED BY JOHN LEWIS. JUDGER PRO TEM SCOTT WEAVER, PRESIDING. SEE CLERK NOTES FOR DETAILS.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GUTIERREZ, MIRTHA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 930 MOSCOW STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL AUG-20-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEFT DOES NOT VACATE, PLTF WILL HAVE AMENDED JUDGMNT FOR BACK RENT OF $5999.00 PLUS DAMAGES OF $36.66/DAY FROM 7-1-96 THRU 8-20-96 TO TOTAL $7868.66. DFT TO RETURN KEYS & LEAVE PREM. IN BROOM-CLEAN CONDITN. WAIVER OF CLAIMS. EACH SIDE OWN FEES & COSTS IF CONDITNS MET.SEC DEPOSIT FORF TO PLTF.
